resources.string: Tap the button below to configure back tap sensitivity and detection parameters
Adjust the global detection parameters for app open/close triggers.
Manage the shared voice trigger template, model, and listening settings.
“Voice recognition” is recommended by default. If a device records poorly in the background, try a different source here.
Manage local Sherpa-ncnn speech-to-text models. You can pre-download models, switch mirrors, import a model archive you downloaded manually, or delete installed models.
When set, all network modules send requests through this proxy. Leave empty to disable the proxy.
Enter the app_id of your Feishu custom app
Enter the app_secret of your Feishu custom app
Enter the latest OAuth authorization code to exchange a user_access_token on first user-mode send
If redirect_uri was used during authorization, keep the same value here
If PKCE was used during authorization, enter the matching code_verifier here
Optional space-separated scope list used to narrow user_access_token permissions
Paste the shared token used by Feishu modules
Feishu modules automatically fetch and cache both app_access_token and tenant_access_token with the App ID and App Secret. Cached tokens are reused until they expire, then refreshed automatically.
If Feishu says the redirect URI is not configured, add the address above once in the developer console under Security Settings -> Redirect URL.
Tap Start Authentication to jump to Feishu. After approval, the app automatically caches user_access_token; if offline_access is enabled and refresh is allowed, it also caches refresh_token.
These presets power ChatScreen. Save multiple providers, model names, API keys, base URLs, and system prompts, then choose a default preset for new conversations.
For example: Daily Chat / DeepSeek Reasoning
Enter the API key for the selected provider
Optional for local services such as Ollama
Most people only need to choose a provider, enter a model name, and paste an API key. You can leave Base URL, system prompt, and temperature at their defaults.
For official providers, the default Base URL is usually correct.
OpenAI-compatible services usually also need a Base URL in Advanced settings.
Local services usually do not need an API key. Use the exact model name installed on your machine.
After saving, the model menu in the upper-left corner of ChatScreen reads these presets immediately. New conversations use the preset marked as default.
Enter at least a model name and base URL. Providers that require authentication must also include an API key.
Ready to record three voice templates
Use the three buttons below to finish all three recordings.
Say the same short phrase clearly. Recording stops automatically after one complete speech segment is detected.
Try to keep your speaking style and surrounding noise similar between recordings. You can adjust the audio source in Module Config -> Voice Trigger.
The captured speech was too weak or too short. Please try again.
The voice trigger model is not downloaded yet. Please download it first in Module Config -> Voice Trigger.
Open Module Config to review and adjust voice trigger settings.
Listening for voice triggers in the background...
Pause workflow for a period of time
Unable to parse max offset as a valid delay duration.
Display a brief message at the bottom of the screen.
The message content to display is empty, cannot execute
Get current content from system clipboard (text or image)
Search installed local apps by app name or package name and return the best-matching package id.
Please provide an app name or package name to search for.
Launch a specified application or one of its internal pages (Activity).
Unable to find launch intent for the app. Please confirm the app is installed or the Activity name is correct
Launch an app shortcut through Shell.
Force stop the specified application (requires Shizuku or Root)
App package name cannot be empty.
Brightness must be a number between 0 and 255
Brightness value must be a number between 0 and 255.
Write specified text or image content to system clipboard
Cannot create safe image URI for clipboard: %s
Turn off screen to put device in sleep mode. Requires Shizuku or Root permission.
Read whether the screen is awake and whether the device is unlocked.
Wake up the screen without performing any unlock action. Requires Shizuku or Root permission.
Unable to wake the screen. Check Shizuku or Root permission.
Wake up the screen and optionally enter a PIN or password to unlock. Pattern lock and biometrics are not supported. Requires Shizuku or Root permission.
Wake screen and unlock with password
Only ASCII PINs or passwords are currently supported for automatic entry.
The device is still locked. If it uses a PIN or password, configure it in this module and try again.
The device is still locked. Check that the password is correct and the lock method is not pattern or biometric verification.
Leave empty to only try swipe unlock
You can enter the device PIN or password for automatic unlock. Pattern lock, fingerprint, and face unlock are not supported.
Show a dialog to request user input for text, number, time or date.
Show a hold-to-talk overlay and transcribe speech to text in real time.
No valid speech content was captured
Use the shared 3-recording template from Module Config and keep listening in the background for similar speech segments.
The shared voice templates in Module Config have not been recorded yet
Click on a screen element, coordinate or view ID
View ID \'%s\' ACTION_CLICK failed, trying gesture click
Successfully clicked view ID \'%s\' via ACTION_CLICK
Gesture click at (%d, %d) failed or cancelled
Input text into the currently focused input field (supports Accessibility and Shell)
Cannot find focused input box, or input box does not support editing.
Shell command failed, please check Root/Shizuku permissions and input method settings.
Cannot input text, please ensure an input box is focused.
Unable to find focused input field or field does not support editing.
Trying to input via vFlow IME...
IME mode failed, falling back to clipboard+paste mode...
Shell command execution failed. Please check Root/Shizuku permissions and IME settings.
Unable to input text. Please ensure an input field is focused.
Stop the current workflow or another specified workflow
Immediately terminate current loop execution and jump to steps after the loop body
Cannot break: not currently in a loop.
Skip remaining steps of current loop and directly enter next iteration
Read value from a named variable or magic variable for use in subsequent steps
Get local or external IP address of the device
Manually start this workflow by clicking a button
Input is not a valid image variable
Cannot create new image entry in gallery
Cannot open output stream for new image file
Create a custom notification in the system notification bar
This is a message from vFlow.
Trigger workflow at specified time and date, like an alarm clock
Repeat the workflow at a fixed time interval
Trigger this workflow when specified app opens or closes
Trigger workflow when the foreground app changes, with optional excluded apps
No excluded apps, listens to all app switches
Trigger workflow when an app is installed, removed, or updated
No app selected, matches any app
Trigger workflow when clipboard content changes
Trigger workflow when battery level meets specific condition
Trigger workflow when power is connected or disconnected
Trigger workflow when the screen turns on, unlocks, or turns off
Trigger when Bluetooth state or device connection changes
Trigger this workflow when specified physical key is pressed (requires Shizuku or Root)
Trigger workflow by tapping the back of your phone (double/triple tap)
Trigger the workflow when the device pose matches a recorded three-axis pose
Trigger workflow when notification matching criteria is received
Trigger workflow when UI element matching the selector appears
Parse GKD format subscription rules and trigger workflow
Trigger workflow when SMS meeting specific criteria is received
Trigger workflow when there is an incoming call, call answered, or call ended
Trigger workflow when Wi-Fi state or network connection changes
Trigger workflow when entering or leaving a specific area
Get the current location and check whether it is within the configured radius
Check whether current location is inside
Create a new variable, optionally name it for later modification or reading
Variable name \'%s\' already exists, please use another name
Obtain usage rights for named variables from another workflow
Modify the value of an existing named variable
Please select a valid named variable
Cannot find variable named \'%s\'. Please create it first using the "Create Variable" module
Create new random variable, optionally name it for later modification or reading
Variable name \'%s\' already exists, please use another name
Min value cannot be greater than max value
Cannot create random variable of type \'%s\'
Unable to open file for writing
Unable to create file; it may already exist or the name is invalid
Get current time with multiple format outputs (timestamp, ISO 8601, custom format, etc.)
Perform text operations like join, split, replace, regex extraction
Need a list variable to join
Source text and find content cannot be empty
Source text and regex pattern cannot be empty
Split text into a list using a delimiter. If delimiter is empty, split by character.
Replace specified content in text with new content
Perform mathematical operations between two numbers
Encode or decode text using Base64
Input text is not a valid Base64 encoded format
Calculate text hashes with MD5, SHA, SM3 and other algorithms
Encode or decode text using URL encoding
Encrypt or decrypt text using AES
Encrypt or decrypt text using DES
Encrypt or decrypt text using RC4
Encrypt or decrypt text using SM4
Extract data from JSON text, supports path syntax (e.g. user.name, users.0.name)
Extract data from XML text using XPath
Add comments to document your workflow design. Will be skipped during execution.
Send HTTP request and get response
Send notification messages to Bark App
Server URL, device key, and body are required
Optional. Usually used with critical notifications, range 0.0-10.0
When enabled, Bark requests auto-copy. On newer iOS versions users may still need to copy manually
Optional custom copied text. If empty, Bark copies the whole push body
Optional link opened after tapping the notification
Send messages through a Discord webhook
Webhook URL and message content are required
Optional. Separate multiple user IDs with |, commas, or new lines
Push messages to any webhook endpoint
Webhook URL and message are required
Webhook URL and custom JSON are required
Fully control the JSON body manually, for example {"content":"test"}
If empty, automatically joins the title and message
If empty, automatically submits title / message fields
Send messages through the Telegram Bot API
Bot token, chat ID, and message text are required
Optional, used for forum topic messages
Send Feishu messages to users or chats as either the app or an authorized user
User open_id / user_id / email or chat_id
Pass the JSON object used as Feishu content for non-text messages
Get historical messages from a Feishu chat or thread
Unix timestamp in seconds, chat only
Unix timestamp in seconds, chat only
Leave empty to start from the first page
Upload files to Feishu cloud documents
Execute system-level operations such as back, home, open notification, etc.
Select an image from gallery or files
Apply Material You style rounded rectangle mask to image
Replicate AutoGLM project. Execute complex mobile operation tasks based on Chain of Thought (CoT) and custom instruction protocols
Fully autonomous AI assistant. Understands screen content based on vision and UI structure to automatically complete tasks
Find area on screen that matches template image, return center coordinate of match
Leave empty to use auto screenshot, or connect an image variable
Recognize text in image, or find coordinates of specified text
Perform tap, long press, or swipe operations on screen
Continuously find text on screen until it appears or timeout. Supports OCR fallback
Accessibility service is not running and OCR mode was not forced.
Use GKD selector syntax to find screen controls
Continuously find specified text on screen until found
Call LLM API (OpenAI/DeepSeek) for intelligent conversation.
Response format not as expected: message.content does not exist
Unable to capture the screen image. Check permissions and try again
Auto mode: falling back to MediaProjection...
Overlay permission is required to select a region
Shizuku or Root permission is required to capture screenshots
Display various types of content (text, numbers, images, etc.) in a float window.
Cannot get UI service to display content.
Find text requires accessibility service, but it is not currently running.
No matching text found on screen: \'%s\' (match mode: %s)
Cannot get root node of current window.
Adjust image parameters like exposure, contrast, saturation, etc.
Need an image variable as input.
Need an image variable as input.
Scale percentage must be greater than 0.
Need an image variable as input.
Find screen elements by text, ID, region and other properties, supports multi-property combination filtering
Please set at least one search condition
Interact with Operit AI assistant: send messages or trigger workflows.
Wait for result timeout, but message was sent
End point of ForEach loop block
Iterate through each item in a list and execute operations
Execute operations here when condition is not met
Execute different operations based on condition
Jump to specified step in workflow and continue execution
Repeat a group of operations fixed number of times
Stop current workflow execution and return a value
End point of While loop block
Execute loop body first, then check condition to continue
End point of Loop Until block, evaluates condition to continue loop
Repeat the loop body while the condition is met
Find all visible notifications in current status bar.
Need notification listener permission to find notifications.
Remove one or more notifications from status bar.
Input is not a valid notification object or notification list.
Need notification listener permission to remove notifications.
Dynamic module defined based on manifest.json
Quick access to Alipay\'s scan, payment code, collection code, etc.
Command to execute cannot be empty.
Quick access to WeChat\'s collection code, payment code.
Turn on, off, or toggle Bluetooth state.
This device does not support Bluetooth.
Get screen usage time statistics for apps on device.
No usage data retrieved. Please ensure "Usage Access Permission" is granted and system has recorded data.
No app usage records in specified time period
Execute Intent, open links, send broadcasts or start services.
Find SMS from inbox by conditions, support verification code extraction.
Use system share function to share text or images.
Cannot get UI service to perform share operation.
Share operation failed to start or was cancelled
Turn on, off, or toggle Wi-Fi state.
Send a broadcast to FlClash to start, stop, or toggle proxy state.
Send a control intent to Clash Meta for Android to start, stop, or toggle proxy state.
Open IT Home and complete the daily check-in.
Start workflow when content (text, image, file) is shared to vFlow.
Activity definition complete, launch activity and start listening for events.
Submit form or trigger event when clicked.
Float window definition complete, launch float window and start listening for events.
Float window launched, waiting for action...
Actively exit and destroy current activity.
This module must be placed inside the "Show Activity" block.
Get UI component object or its value.
Component \'%s\' does not exist in current activity
Listen for click or modification events on specified component.
This module must be placed inside the "Show Activity" block.
Target component must be a UI component object
Modify component properties (such as text, visibility, layout).
Target component ID cannot be empty
Execute Lua script, can call other module functions.
Lua script content cannot be empty.
Execute JavaScript script, can call other module functions.
JavaScript script content cannot be empty.
Get package name of current foreground app.
Get list of currently running apps.
Use vFlow Core to read current mobile data switch state.
Use vFlow Core to enable or disable mobile data.
Use vFlow Core to enable or disable WiFi.
Use vFlow Core to control Bluetooth state (on/off/toggle).
Use vFlow Core to read current Bluetooth switch state.
Reading Bluetooth state via vFlow Core...
Capture screen screenshot using vFlow Core, based on scrcpy implementation
Use vFlow Core to force stop a specific app.
vFlow Core failed to force stop app: %1$s
Use vFlow Core to read clipboard content.
Use vFlow Core to input text, faster and more stable than accessibility service.
Send key events using vFlow Core, faster and more stable than accessibility service
Key code must be a number
Cannot parse %1$s as a valid key code.
Use vFlow Core to perform tap, long press, or swipe operations, faster and more stable than accessibility service.
vFlow Core long press operation failed
Target position is empty. Please ensure coordinates are set or connected to upstream module\'s coordinate output.
Target position format is invalid. Requires Coordinate type or \"x,y\" format string.
Long pressing coordinate (%d, %d) for %dms via vFlow Core...
Create a virtual touch device through vFlow Core and perform tap, long press, or swipe operations via uinput. Root is required.
This action requires Root privileges because it creates a uinput device, but vFlow Core is currently running with Shell privileges.
vFlow Core uinput long press failed: %1$s
Long pressing coordinate (%d, %d) for %dms via vFlow Core (uinput)...
Read whether the screen is awake and whether the device is unlocked using vFlow Core
Reading screen status via vFlow Core...
Use vFlow Core to set clipboard content.
vFlow Core failed to set clipboard
Execute Shell commands via vFlow Core (supports Shell/Root permissions)
Command to execute cannot be empty.
This action requires Root permission, but vFlow Core is currently running with Shell privileges.
Turn off screen using vFlow Core
Turning off screen via vFlow Core...
Replay recorded touch sequence, adjustable playback speed
Please record touch operations in editor first
vFlow Core service not running. Please ensure Shizuku or Root permission is granted.
Overlay permission required to record touch operations
Wake up screen using vFlow Core
Waking up screen via vFlow Core...
Control WiFi state using vFlow Core (on/off/toggle).
Use vFlow Core to read current WiFi switch state.
Reading WiFi state via vFlow Core...
Control Wi-Fi hotspot state using vFlow Core (enable/disable/toggle).
Use vFlow Core to read the current Wi-Fi hotspot switch state.
Hotspot control requires vFlow Core to run in Root mode.
Control volume for different audio streams using vFlow Core (music/notification/ring etc).
Read current volume levels for different audio streams using vFlow Core.

Some volume operations failed. Please check:
1. Is Do Not Disturb (DND) enabled?
2. Are Shizuku or Root permissions granted?
3. Is vFlow Core running correctly?
vFlow Core failed to read volume state
Use vFlow Core to control NFC state (Enable/Disable/Toggle).
Use vFlow Core to read the current NFC state.
Play built-in system sounds or local audio files, with volume control support.
Please select a local audio file
Control mobile data switch (enable/disable/toggle) via shell commands.
Get information about the current foreground Activity, including Activity name, package name, app name, etc.
Directly dial the specified phone number.
Phone number is empty, cannot execute
Unable to make phone call, please check if you have call permission
An exception occurred while making phone call
Convert text to speech and speak it aloud using Android\'s built-in TTS engine
Please enter the text to speak
Speech rate must be between 0.5 and 2.0
Unable to initialize TTS engine, please check system TTS settings
Speech operation timed out, TTS engine may be too slow
Turn Do Not Disturb on, off, or toggle it. Android 15+ uses vFlow\'s own DND rule; earlier Android versions use the global DND switch.
Allow vFlow to control Do Not Disturb mode in system settings.
Failed to set Do Not Disturb
Unable to create vFlow automatic Do Not Disturb rule
vFlow automatic Do Not Disturb rule enabled
vFlow automatic Do Not Disturb rule disabled
Control auto-rotate or lock the screen orientation.
Trigger device vibration with configurable duration and patterns
Control device flashlight with toggle, on, and off modes
IV length must be %1$d bytes in CBC mode.
%1$s length must be a multiple of %2$d bytes.
Leave empty to use the auto-fetched cached token from settings
Select or reference the image file to upload
Leave empty to use the original filename
The document token used as upload target
vFlow Core service is not running. Please ensure Shizuku or Root permissions are granted.
Show a fullscreen color flash on the screen as a visual cue.
Flash count must be greater than 0
